invalidAmount: Invalid amount. Please check the payment total.
productNotFound: One or more products could not be found. They may have been removed from the catalog. Please remove them from your order.
invoiceCreationFailed: Invoice could not be created. Fix the error and try again.
paymentRecordingFailed: Payment could not be recorded. Fix the error and try again.
paymentNotRecordedCompleteOnOrder: Order created but payment could not be recorded. You can complete payment on the order page.
